name: kungfu
description: Kungfu skills — dev playbooks (bugfix/feature/refactor/investigate/review/test), the dev-loop, and doc/spec authoring for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Dev playbooks, the dev-loop, and doc/spec authoring for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Kungfu ships fixed procedures for coding work — reproduce-first bug fixing, acceptance-checklist features, behaviour-zero refactors, evidence-based investigation, code review, kill-proof tests, and an end-to-end dev-loop — plus doc/spec authoring skills.
